name: Permesan Chicken Wings Oreganata
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. In a paper bag, combine cheese, parsley, paprika, oregano, basil, salt, and pepper. Toss to mix.
2. Pour melted butter into a shallow bowl.
3. Dip chicken pieces into butter, then place in a paper bag and shake to coat.
4. Place chicken on foil-lined baking sheet and bake for 45 minutes.
5. Serve hot.
